comments.comment:
Contacts on a phone should have been the ultimate driver of engagement... like it must seemlessly route the interaction to whichever platform out there.

comments.name: Sri
comments.comment: That does make decent sense. We probably did start on that path several years ago? Between decentralizing communication and swinging to the extreme of building closed networks, this is something that took a major hit.
